title: Cook, Serve, Delicious!
description:
Rags to RichesYour journey to culinary greatness begins today. Take your restaurant from a lowly 1-star eatery cooking corndogs to a luxury 5-star establishment serving delicious steaks.

Throughout your journey, you'll improve your restaurant with new equipment, food upgrades, and more.

Plan Your MenuIn Cook, Serve, Delicious you can cook 30 different foods. Upgrade individual foods to add new ingredients, increase menu prices, and up the difficulty.

Meanwhile, dynamic events such as weather will impact the popularity of your menu and encourage you to keep things fresh!

Cook with Friends in Local Multiplayer!Cook, Serve, Delicious comes packed with a multitude of local multiplayer modes!

• Co-Op Campaign: Play through the entire campaign with a friend. One plays as the expediter who sends orders to the Chef, while the other cooks orders given to them. 

• Tag-Team Local Multiplayer: Grab up to four controllers as you take turns manning the chef station in the Battle Kitchen. You only have fifteen seconds to cook, and five seconds to explain to the next cook what to do first!

• Endurance Mode: Tag team with up to four players to make as many foods perfectly as possible.

• Strike Challenges: Take on 12 new challenges alone, or with up to four players.

Expansion Packs Included!Cook, Serve, Delicious includes two huge expansion packs! Battle Kitchen Edition introduces new modes and 25 playable cameo characters from other indie games. Meanwhile, Extra Crispy Edition adds 10 new foods to the base game.

So what are you waiting for? Let's get cooking!
description_short: Hungry? Take your restaurant from a one star abomination to a five star wonder in Cook, Serve, Delicious! Plan your menu, upgrade your equipment, and master challenges with easy-to-learn, hard-to-master gameplay!
